title: OSDUE Folding Tabletop Mirror, 25.5 * 18cm Black PU Leather Portable Travel and Desktop Vanity Mirror with Stand for Office Desk, Vanity Table, Camping
features: Perfect Size - OSDUE folding mirror measures 25.5*18cm and can be folded for easy storage and carrying.

Multi-angle adjustment - The folding mirror can be adjusted up to 180 degrees at will. You can adjust the angle of the mirror as needed. The adjustable dressing mirror allows you to find the perfect makeup angle, and every detail is fully displayed. It is very suitable for office desks, dressing tables, countertops, cosmetic beauty use.

HD Folding Glass Mirror - High-quality thickened glass, smooth mirror edge, polished to prevent injury. Clear mirror, no distortion, no dizziness, show your true beauty. The exterior of the mirror is made of soft PU leather, which can effectively protect the mirror, waterproof, non-slip, scratch-resistant, fashionable and durable.

Easy to carry - Our travel makeup mirror adopts a foldable design, with a thickness of 1.3cm after folding, which can be put into a travel bag or handbag, taking up little space and easy to store. It is very suitable for travel, camping, vacation, and is also an ideal choice for home, school, office, store, hotel and other places.

Perfect gift - Folding mirrors of different sizes can be used as travel mirrors, makeup mirrors, bathroom mirrors, etc. It is a perfect makeup gift for friends, lovers and professional makeup artists, lighting up every moment of life.
